## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 bullet points.

## Validation

- [ ] `dart run melos run analyze`
- [ ] `dart run melos run test`
- [ ] relevant `publish --dry-run` checks when package metadata or README changed
- [ ] changelog updated if behavior or API changed

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to the stated problem.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented.
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests.
- [ ] README or examples were updated when user-facing behavior changed.

## Notes

Add migration notes, known limitations, or follow-up work if needed.
